title: Cobblemon Launchers
description: A Cobblemon mod that adds Pokéball launchers that you can use to catch Pokémon.
body:
![Clumpy Bros](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18687dd80feef348a9375afdcfb28892c8b76e73.png)
This mod adds 3d Pokéball Launchers to Cobblemon. All 48 Pokéballs that are currently obtainable in Cobblemon have their own custom texture. The launchers have increased speed and distance compared to normal throwing. The launchers have inventories. You are able to store up to 3 stacks of the ball that your launcher is made for. There is also a 49th launcher called the Universal Launcher that works with any ball.

<details>
<summary>Launcher Storage</summary>

If you crouch and right click with the launcher in your hand the inventory will open. You are only able to store the ball that corresponds to the launcher you have. For example if you have the Ultra Ball Launcher you can only store Ultra Balls in the inventory.

If you have the Universal Ball Launcher you can store any ball you like. The ball in the first slot will always have priority.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>
The key below shows Material "M" and Ball "B". The only thing that changes between the recipes is the type of ball it is made with and the material. I will only give the material for each launcher recipe because the order never changes and the name of the ball is in the Launcher's name (Except for the Universal Launcher). The key shows exactly how to place the items in a crafting table. 
  
All launchers have this shape in a crafting table:

- ("MMM")
- ("MB ")
- ("M  ")

Poké Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Great Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Ultra Ball Launcher: Gold Ingot

Master Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Safari Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Fast Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Level Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Lure Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Heavy Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Love Ball Launcher: Gold Ingot

Friend Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Moon Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Sport Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Net Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Dive Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Nest Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Repeat Ball Launcher: Gold Ingot

Timer Ball Launcher: Gold Ingot

Luxury Ball Launcher: Gold Ingot

Premier Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Dusk Ball Launcher: Gold Ingot

Heal Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Quick Ball Launcher: Gold Ingot

Cherish Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Park Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot

Dream Ball Launcher: Diamond

Beast Ball Launcher: Diamond

Slate Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Verdant Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Azure Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Roseate Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Citrine Ball Launcher: Copper Ingot

Ancient Poké Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Ancient Great Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Ancient Ultra Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Ancient Feather Ball Launcher: Sky Tumblestone

Ancient Wing Ball Launcher: Sky Tumblestone

Ancient Jet Ball Launcher: Sky Tumblestone

Ancient Heavy Ball Launcher: Black Tumblestone

Ancient Leaden Ball Launcher: Black Tumblestone

Ancient Gigaton Ball Launcher: Black Tumblestone

Ancient Origin Ball Launcher: Black Tumblestone

Ancient Slate Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Ancient Ivory Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Ancient Citrine Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Ancient Azure Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Ancient Roseate Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Ancient Verdant Ball Launcher: Tumblestone

Universal Ball Launcher: Iron Ingot instead of a Ball
</details>


<details>
<summary>Mods That May Have Visual Incompatibility</summary>

Any mod that changes the player model like Yes Steve Model will be held at a different angle than intended in third person. All other functions will work.

</details>


For Cobblemon 1.7.0 and above.
For any questions or issues not answered on this page join the Discord for support.
